# Elevate Design System

> SQLI's CSS-only design system built on DaisyUI with custom brand themes.

## Overview

Elevate Design System is a stateless CSS library providing themed components for SQLI applications. It does NOT include JavaScript framework integrations - those are the responsibility of consuming projects.

## Quick Start

```bash
npm install git+https://gitlab-paris.sqli.com/SQLI/elevate-design-system.git
```

```css
@import '@sqli/elevate-design-system/dist/sqli-design-system.css';
@import '@sqli/elevate-design-system/dist/fonts.css';
```

```html
<html data-theme="sqli-light">
  <button class="btn btn-primary">Hello World</button>
</html>
```

## Themes

| Theme | Background | Primary | Usage |
|-------|------------|---------|-------|
| sqli-light | Cream (#FFFAF0) | Cobalt (#1F24E9) | Default |
| sqli-dark | Midnight (#0F0E2B) | Sky (#6DA5FF) | Dark mode |

## Brand Colors

- **Cream**: #FFFAF0 - Light background
- **Midnight**: #0F0E2B - Dark background, text
- **Cobalt**: #1F24E9 - Primary (light mode)
- **Sky**: #6DA5FF - Primary (dark mode)

## Typography

- **Font**: TWK Everett
- **Weights**: Light (300), Regular (400), Medium (500), Bold (700)

## Components (65+)

All components use DaisyUI classes:

### Actions
- Button: `btn`, `btn-primary`, `btn-secondary`, `btn-accent`, `btn-ghost`
- Dropdown: `dropdown`, `dropdown-content`
- Modal: `modal`, `modal-box`
- Swap: `swap`, `swap-rotate`

### Data Display
- Card: `card`, `card-body`, `card-title`
- Badge: `badge`, `badge-primary`
- Avatar: `avatar`
- Table: `table`
- Timeline: `timeline`

### Data Input
- Input: `input`, `input-bordered`
- Select: `select`, `select-bordered`
- Checkbox: `checkbox`, `checkbox-primary`
- Toggle: `toggle`, `toggle-primary`
- Radio: `radio`, `radio-primary`
- Textarea: `textarea`
- File Input: `file-input`
- Range: `range`
- Rating: `rating`

### Feedback
- Alert: `alert`, `alert-info`, `alert-success`, `alert-warning`, `alert-error`
- Loading: `loading`, `loading-spinner`
- Progress: `progress`, `progress-primary`
- Toast: `toast`
- Skeleton: `skeleton`

### Layout
- Divider: `divider`
- Drawer: `drawer`
- Hero: `hero`
- Stack: `stack`
- Artboard: `artboard`

### Navigation
- Tabs: `tabs`, `tab`, `tab-active`
- Menu: `menu`
- Navbar: `navbar`
- Breadcrumbs: `breadcrumbs`
- Pagination: `pagination`
- Steps: `steps`
- Bottom Navigation: `btm-nav`

## Code Examples

### Button Variants
```html
<button class="btn">Default</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary">Primary</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary</button>
<button class="btn btn-accent">Accent</button>
<button class="btn btn-ghost">Ghost</button>
<button class="btn btn-link">Link</button>
```

### Button Sizes
```html
<button class="btn btn-xs">Extra Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-sm">Small</button>
<button class="btn btn-md">Medium</button>
<button class="btn btn-lg">Large</button>
```

### Card
```html
<div class="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl">
  <figure><img src="image.jpg" alt="Image" /></figure>
  <div class="card-body">
    <h2 class="card-title">Title</h2>
    <p>Description</p>
    <div class="card-actions justify-end">
      <button class="btn btn-primary">Action</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

### Form Input with Label
```html
<label class="form-control w-full">
  <div class="label">
    <span class="label-text">Email</span>
  </div>
  <input type="email" class="input input-bordered" />
</label>
```

### Alert
```html
<div role="alert" class="alert alert-info">
  <span>Info message</span>
</div>
```

### Tabs
```html
<div role="tablist" class="tabs tabs-bordered">
  <a role="tab" class="tab">Tab 1</a>
  <a role="tab" class="tab tab-active">Tab 2</a>
  <a role="tab" class="tab">Tab 3</a>
</div>
```

### Theme Switching
```javascript
// Toggle between themes
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', 'sqli-dark');
```

```html
<!-- DaisyUI theme controller -->
<input type="checkbox" value="sqli-dark" class="toggle theme-controller" />
```

## Distribution

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| dist/sqli-design-system.css | Full CSS (~267 KB) |
| dist/sqli-design-system.min.css | Minified CSS (~198 KB) |
| dist/tokens.css | CSS variables only (~3 KB) |
| dist/fonts.css | Font declarations (~2 KB) |
| dist/fonts/ | TWK Everett font files |
| dist/logos/ | SQLI logos (SVG & PNG) |

## Platform.sh CDN

No build required:

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://main-bvxea6i-n3mp4dy5ud5ck.fr-3.platformsh.site/assets/sqli-design-system.min.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://main-bvxea6i-n3mp4dy5ud5ck.fr-3.platformsh.site/assets/fonts.css" />
```

## Resources

- Storybook: https://main-bvxea6i-n3mp4dy5ud5ck.fr-3.platformsh.site/
- Repository: https://gitlab-paris.sqli.com/SQLI/elevate-design-system
- DaisyUI Docs: https://daisyui.com/components/

## SQLI Brand Guidelines

- Logo "sqli" always lowercase
- In text, write "SQLI" uppercase
- Promise: "Elevate. Digitally" (period only after "Elevate")
